name: Chicken Chili
recipeIngredient: 1 small Avocado, Cut Into 1/4 in. Dices
1/3 cup Minced Fresh Cilantro OR Italian Parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Wrap chicken and freeze until firm, but not solid.
2. Grind coarsely in a processor, using on/off turns.
3. Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
4. Add onions, green peppers, and garlic; cook until golden brown, stirring frequently, about 15 minutes.
5. Mix in cumin, oregano, thyme, salt, and pepper for 2 minutes.
6. Add ground round, bay leaves, and chicken; cook until meat and chicken are no longer pink and breaking up with a spoon, about 5 minutes.
7. Stir in chili powder; reduce heat to medium and simmer 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
8. Add tomatoes, breaking up large pieces with a spoon; stir in tomato paste, salt, and pepper.
9. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 45 minutes, stirring occasionally.
10. Uncover, reduce heat to the lowest setting, and cook for 1 1/2 hours, stirring frequently near the end and adding water if necessary to prevent burning.
11. Adjust seasoning (can be prepared up to 1 day ahead and refrigerated).
12. Sprinkle avocado with lemon juice; serve chili in large soup bowls, spooning 2 T. yogurt into the center of each bowl, topping with diced avocado and minced cilantro. Serve hot.
